Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This last pitch will mark the end of our summer... Focus, give it everything you've got![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Everyone in the stadium fell silent. That final pitch was the hardest fastball of the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Did you see that!? That's the result of all my training![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel inspired by the athletes[n]playing their absolute hardest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Wow, wasn't that great? Now that's what youthful passion looks like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
